seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (score = 1e5*sum(k)/(W*H)), reflections allowed; checker validates no-overlap and in-bounds.
mutation: composite: generalize the input (obstruction cells that cannot be covered + a per-shape supply cap turning it into a bounded/multi-dimensional knapsack) AND retighten the output (each placement must be a valid dihedral orientation of a catalogued cooling-zone polyomino), skinned as a data-center cooling-zone tiling problem.
title: Data-Center Cooling-Zone Tiling
strategies: input-order first-fit with no rotation (weak baseline)
value-density greedy: largest-area cooling zones first, all 8 orientations, single first-fit pass
multi-restart randomized greedy with shuffled shape/orientation order plus a small-shape hole-filling pass
DP / LP-relaxation of the bounded knapsack for zone-count selection followed by constructive placement
